case_title: VORTEX INDUSTRIES, INC. VS. VAN SALES CO.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-25-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VAN SALES CO.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,691.05 FILED BY VORTEX INDUSTRIES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT VAN SALES CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIF VORTEX INDUSTRIES, INC. OR DEFENDANT VAN SALES CO. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
